TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_fishing_Pani
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: 'aa sua nganaimaku ia Pani.
S.PHON: ʔaa sua ŋanaimaku ia pani.
S.FORM: 'aa sua nganaimaku ia Pani.
S.PHON: ʔaa sua ŋanaimaku ia pani.
S.TRANSL: 嗯,我的名字是Pani.
Well, my name is Pani.

S.FORM: teku poiisua PARIfish 'arasakai miana.
S.PHON: teku poiisua par~ɾifish ʔar~ɾasakai miana.
S.FORM: teku poiisua PARIfish 'arasakai miana.
S.PHON: teku poiisua par~ɾifish ʔar~ɾasakai miana.

TRANSL.notes: 我要說關於以前小時候捕魚、捕蝦(的事情).

S.TRANSL: 我要說關於以前小時候捕魚、捕蝦 .
I'm going to talk about catching fish and shirps in the childhood.

S.FORM: 'aa mia tati'iingpaku kipapakia mamarang.
S.PHON: ʔaa mia tatiʔiiŋpaku kipapakia mamar~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: 'aa mia tati'iingpaku kipapakia mamarang.
S.PHON: ʔaa mia tatiʔiiŋpaku kipapakia mamar~ɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我小時候跟隨著長輩們.
I followed the seniors when I was little.

S.FORM: iikita Kanakanavu ia miana ifweto makeCahouse makecabin nukai ka'umoo'uma manmaan mamarangmita tekiriim na aracan na cakʉran nukai nungnung.
S.PHON: iikita kanakanavu ia miana ifweto makeʦahouse makeʦa*in nukai kaʔumooʔuma manmaan mamar~ɾaŋmita tekir~ɾiim na ar~ɾaʦan na ʦakɨr~ɾan nukai nuŋnuŋ.
S.FORM: iikita Kanakanavu ia miana ifweto makeCahouse makecabin nukai ka'umoo'uma manmaan mamarangmita tekiriim na aracan na cakʉran nukai nungnung.
S.PHON: iikita kanakanavu ia miana ifweto makeʦahouse makeʦa*in nukai kaʔumooʔuma manmaan mamar~ɾaŋmita tekir~ɾiim na ar~ɾaʦan na ʦakɨr~ɾan nukai nuŋnuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我們Kanakanavu以前若要蓋房子、蓋工寮、或者是開墾田園,我們的老人家喜歡找接近河流或溪流的地方.
In the past, if we Kanakanavu were to build houses, cabins and cultivate fields, our seniors liked to look for the places near a river or stream.

S.FORM: vanai sii noo ka'aniin 'ituumuru putukikioa na 'umoo'uma ia iikita Kanakanavu tamna sasaronai ia manmaancu mookusa cakʉran nukai nungnung parivutuukuru 'arasakai 'apasʉ.
S.PHON: vanai sii noo kaʔaniin ʔituumur~ɾu putukikioa na ʔumooʔuma ia iikita kanakanavu tamna sasar~ɾonai ia manmaanʦu mookusa ʦakɨr~ɾan nukai nuŋnuŋ par~ɾivutuukur~ɾu ʔar~ɾasakai ʔapasɨ.
S.FORM: vanai sii noo ka'aniin 'ituumuru putukikioa na 'umoo'uma ia iikita Kanakanavu tamna sasaronai ia manmaancu mookusa cakʉran nukai nungnung parivutuukuru 'arasakai 'apasʉ.
S.PHON: vanai sii noo kaʔaniin ʔituumur~ɾu putukikioa na ʔumooʔuma ia iikita kanakanavu tamna sasar~ɾonai ia manmaanʦu mookusa ʦakɨr~ɾan nukai nuŋnuŋ par~ɾivutuukur~ɾu ʔar~ɾasakai ʔapasɨ.
S.TRANSL: 因為當農事的工作不很多的時候,我們Kanakanavu的男士們就非常喜歡去河流或者是溪谷裡面捕魚、捕蝦、補螃蟹.
Because when the load of farming work is not heavy, Our Kanakanavu men like to go to rivers or streams to catch fish, shrimps, and crabs.

S.FORM: uturu iikita tamna Kanakanavu siarupaca mara vutuukuru.
S.PHON: utur~ɾu iikita tamna kanakanavu siar~ɾupaʦa mar~ɾa vutuukur~ɾu.
S.FORM: uturu iikita tamna Kanakanavu siarupaca mara vutuukuru.
S.PHON: utur~ɾu iikita tamna kanakanavu siar~ɾupaʦa mar~ɾa vutuukur~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 我們kanakanavu捕魚蝦的工具有三種.
We Kanakanavu have three ways of catching fish and shrimps.

S.FORM: ucani ia pinaarupu pinarupuun sua vutuukuru.
S.PHON: uʦani ia pinaar~ɾupu pinar~ɾupuun sua vutuukur~ɾu.
S.FORM: ucani ia pinaarupu pinarupuun sua vutuukuru.
S.PHON: uʦani ia pinaar~ɾupu pinar~ɾupuun sua vutuukur~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 第一個方式是垂釣,魚用吊的.
One is angling, which hangs fish up.

S.FORM: ucani ia pusu'uriing.
S.PHON: uʦani ia pusuʔur~ɾiiŋ.
S.FORM: ucani ia pusu'uriing.
S.PHON: uʦani ia pusuʔur~ɾiiŋ.
S.TRANSL: 第二種方式是用火把照明.
Another is pusu'uriing.

S.FORM: sua pusu'uriing ia 'uruupaca noo mapitʉ'ʉcu taniara mavici 'uringi mookusa na cakʉran.
S.PHON: sua pusuʔur~ɾiiŋ ia ʔur~ɾuupaʦa noo mapitɨʔɨʦu taniar~ɾa maviʦi ʔur~ɾiŋi mookusa na ʦakɨr~ɾan.
S.FORM: sua pusu'uriing ia 'uruupaca noo mapitʉ'ʉcu taniara mavici 'uringi mookusa na cakʉran.
S.PHON: sua pusuʔur~ɾiiŋ ia ʔur~ɾuupaʦa noo mapitɨʔɨʦu taniar~ɾa maviʦi ʔur~ɾiŋi mookusa na ʦakɨr~ɾan.

TRANSL.notes: 所謂用火把照明是利用天暗之後,帶著芒草莖去河裡(溪裡).

S.TRANSL: 所謂用火把照明是利用天暗之後,帶著芒草莖去河裡 .
The so-called pusu'uriing is that one brings the stalks of Japanese silvergrass to rivers partucularly after it gets dark in the evening.

S.FORM: 'uru 'uruupaca nguain tamna sinaang cumacʉ'ʉra na nungnung nukai cakʉran tamna canuum.
S.PHON: ʔur~ɾu ʔur~ɾuupaʦa ŋuain tamna sinaaŋ ʦumaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa na nuŋnuŋ nukai ʦakɨr~ɾan tamna ʦanuum.
S.FORM: 'uru 'uruupaca nguain tamna sinaang cumacʉ'ʉra na nungnung nukai cakʉran tamna canuum.
S.PHON: ʔur~ɾu ʔur~ɾuupaʦa ŋuain tamna sinaaŋ ʦumaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa na nuŋnuŋ nukai ʦakɨr~ɾan tamna ʦanuum.
S.TRANSL: 利用他的亮光來看河流或者溪流的水.

TRANSL.notes: And (He) uses his light to beam at the water of rivers.

S.TRANSL: And uses his light to beam at the water of rivers.

S.FORM: noo 'esiin nia vutuukuru nukai 'arasakai ia maracukia caraa'acʉ sapuarʉ mara vutuukuru.
S.PHON: noo ʔesiin nia vutuukur~ɾu nukai ʔar~ɾasakai ia mar~ɾaʦukia ʦar~ɾaaʔaʦɨ sapuar~ɾɨ mar~ɾa vutuukur~ɾu.
S.FORM: noo 'esiin nia vutuukuru nukai 'arasakai ia maracukia caraa'acʉ sapuarʉ mara vutuukuru.
S.PHON: noo ʔesiin nia vutuukur~ɾu nukai ʔar~ɾasakai ia mar~ɾaʦukia ʦar~ɾaaʔaʦɨ sapuar~ɾɨ mar~ɾa vutuukur~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 那裏若有魚蝦,我們就拿著魚叉或撈網來補魚.
If there are fish and shrimps, we will takes fish spears and fishing nets to catch fish.

S.FORM: makai um maseen ia neen kusai vanai Kanakanavu maraa 'aancu pusukiriing.
S.PHON: makai um maseen ia neen kusai vanai kanakanavu mar~ɾaa ʔaanʦu pusukir~ɾiiŋ.
S.FORM: makai um maseen ia neen kusai vanai Kanakanavu maraa 'aancu pusukiriing.
S.PHON: makai um maseen ia neen kusai vanai kanakanavu mar~ɾaa ʔaanʦu pusukir~ɾiiŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 但是,究竟什麼原因,現在的kanakanavu人不再用火把照明來(捕魚)了?

S.TRANSL: 但是,究竟什麼原因,現在的kanakanavu人不再用火把照明來 了?
But, why on earth do Kanakanavu nowadays no longer pusukiriing?

S.FORM: ka'aanku kangvang tavarʉ'ʉ neen kusai.
S.PHON: kaʔaanku kaŋvaŋ tavar~ɾɨʔɨ neen kusai.
S.FORM: ka'aanku kangvang tavarʉ'ʉ neen kusai.
S.PHON: kaʔaanku kaŋvaŋ tavar~ɾɨʔɨ neen kusai.
S.TRANSL: 我也不知道什麼原因.
I don't know the reason, either.

S.FORM: makaasua.
S.PHON: makaasua.
S.FORM: makaasua.
S.PHON: makaasua.
S.TRANSL: 那樣...
In that way...

S.FORM: sua ucani ia tumatuuncu.
S.PHON: sua uʦani ia tumatuunʦu.
S.FORM: sua ucani ia tumatuuncu.
S.PHON: sua uʦani ia tumatuunʦu.
S.TRANSL: 再來一種方式是毒魚.
The other is tumatuuncu.

S.FORM: ka'aan tia upeen takananga vutuukuru mataa 'arasakai ia ka'aan mamacai nakai arapipining na canumu makai naturucu.
S.PHON: kaʔaan tia upeen takanaŋa vutuukur~ɾu mataa ʔar~ɾasakai ia kaʔaan mamaʦai nakai ar~ɾapipiniŋ na ʦanumu makai natur~ɾuʦu.
S.FORM: ka'aan tia upeen takananga vutuukuru mataa 'arasakai ia ka'aan mamacai nakai arapipining na canumu makai naturucu.
S.PHON: kaʔaan tia upeen takanaŋa vutuukur~ɾu mataa ʔar~ɾasakai ia kaʔaan mamaʦai nakai ar~ɾapipiniŋ na ʦanumu makai natur~ɾuʦu.
S.TRANSL: 不用多久,魚跟蝦子不會死,但是會浮出水面上,很像呆癡了.
Before long, fish and shrimps won't die but will float from the water, becoming dull.

S.FORM: meesua ia cau ia 'uruupaca kangvang caraa'acʉ mataa sapuarʉ umara vutuukuru.
S.PHON: meesua ia ʦau ia ʔur~ɾuupaʦa kaŋvaŋ ʦar~ɾaaʔaʦɨ mataa sapuar~ɾɨ umar~ɾa vutuukur~ɾu.
S.FORM: meesua ia cau ia 'uruupaca kangvang caraa'acʉ mataa sapuarʉ umara vutuukuru.
S.PHON: meesua ia ʦau ia ʔur~ɾuupaʦa kaŋvaŋ ʦar~ɾaaʔaʦɨ mataa sapuar~ɾɨ umar~ɾa vutuukur~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 在那個時候,人們就用魚叉或撈網來捕魚.
At that time, people use fish spears amd fishing nets to catch fish.

S.FORM: nakai sua tumat tumatuncu ia tia tuturuun cau kangvang tia arakukun mookusa nia kangvang ka'aan tavarʉ'ʉ taciin maa mookusa nia tia arakuracʉ cau cau cucumeen.
S.PHON: nakai sua tumat tumatunʦu ia tia tutur~ɾuun ʦau kaŋvaŋ tia ar~ɾakukun mookusa nia kaŋvaŋ kaʔaan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ taʦiin maa mookusa nia tia ar~ɾakur~ɾaʦɨ ʦau ʦau ʦuʦumeen.
S.FORM: nakai sua tumat tumatuncu ia tia tuturuun cau kangvang tia arakukun mookusa nia kangvang ka'aan tavarʉ'ʉ taciin maa mookusa nia tia arakuracʉ cau cau cucumeen.
S.PHON: nakai sua tumat tumatunʦu ia tia tutur~ɾuun ʦau kaŋvaŋ tia ar~ɾakukun mookusa nia kaŋvaŋ kaʔaan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ taʦiin maa mookusa nia tia ar~ɾakur~ɾaʦɨ ʦau ʦau ʦuʦumeen.
S.TRANSL: 但是用毒魚的方式來捕魚的話,必須通告所有的人來參與,不可以只有一個人去,其他人會生氣的.

TRANSL.notes: but as to t<um>a-tuncu, (it) has to inform everyone to go. It is prohibited that a person goes alone. Other people will get angry.

S.TRANSL: but as to t<um>a-tuncu, has to inform everyone to go. It is prohibited that a person goes alone. Other people will get angry.

S.FORM: er manasʉ cenana ia makaan nukai makacusa maa cau tumatuncu miana arakukun kangvang mookusa 'inia.
S.PHON: er~ɾ manasɨ ʦenana ia makaan nukai makaʦusa maa ʦau tumatunʦu miana ar~ɾakukun kaŋvaŋ mookusa ʔinia.
S.FORM: er manasʉ cenana ia makaan nukai makacusa maa cau tumatuncu miana arakukun kangvang mookusa 'inia.
S.PHON: er~ɾ manasɨ ʦenana ia makaan nukai makaʦusa maa ʦau tumatunʦu miana ar~ɾakukun kaŋvaŋ mookusa ʔinia.
S.TRANSL: 嗯,以前或許一年一次或者兩次大家一起前往去毒魚.
Well, in the past, all poeple t<um>a-tuncu together maybe once or twice a year.

S.FORM: sua mastaan ka'anmanamaku matipa ia pinaarupu.
S.PHON: sua mastaan kaʔanmanamaku matipa ia pinaar~ɾupu.
S.FORM: sua mastaan ka'anmanamaku matipa ia pinaarupu.
S.PHON: sua mastaan kaʔanmanamaku matipa ia pinaar~ɾupu.
S.TRANSL: 我最喜歡參加的是釣魚.
What I like to join most is fishing.

S.FORM: noo makasiin mamarang tuu Pani nura ia tekita pinaarupu misee iak! aranai meesuaku tecikia sii macangcangarʉ ia ah mariitarʉ miseen ka'aanpa aramia'ʉ tecukia mook mookusa 'inia.
S.PHON: noo makasiin mamar~ɾaŋ tuu pani nur~ɾa ia tekita pinaar~ɾupu misee iak! ar~ɾanai meesuaku teʦikia sii maʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨ ia ah mar~ɾiitar~ɾɨ miseen kaʔaanpa ar~ɾamiaʔɨ teʦukia mook mookusa ʔinia.
S.FORM: noo makasiin mamarang tuu Pani nura ia tekita pinaarupu misee iak! aranai meesuaku tecikia sii macangcangarʉ ia ah mariitarʉ miseen ka'aanpa aramia'ʉ tecukia mook mookusa 'inia.
S.PHON: noo makasiin mamar~ɾaŋ tuu pani nur~ɾa ia tekita pinaar~ɾupu misee iak! ar~ɾanai meesuaku teʦikia sii maʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨ ia ah mar~ɾiitar~ɾɨ miseen kaʔaanpa ar~ɾamiaʔɨ teʦukia mook mookusa ʔinia.
S.TRANSL: 如果有長輩說,Pani我們明天要釣魚,啊,我就在那裏非常開心,一直等待著怎麼還沒起床,因為想要去了.
If there is a senior says "Pani, we will go fishing tomorrow," ah, I will be very happy at that time and keep waiting, thinking why we still don't get up because I've wanted to go.

S.FORM: nakai noo pinarupiin ia tekita mati'araang peecapa narupu.
S.PHON: nakai noo pinar~ɾupiin ia tekita matiʔar~ɾaaŋ peeʦapa nar~ɾupu.
S.FORM: nakai noo pinarupiin ia tekita mati'araang peecapa narupu.
S.PHON: nakai noo pinar~ɾupiin ia tekita matiʔar~ɾaaŋ peeʦapa nar~ɾupu.
S.TRANSL: 但是如果要釣魚,我們要準備吊桿、魚鉤.
But if we want to fish, we need to prepare a fishing pole and hook.

S.FORM: sua peecapa Kanakanavu miana ia 'uruupacakim ta'uici ta'uici tia mata'ʉ umara tikiriimkia ʉncoo maraa ma'inacʉ to'umaang arʉʉn tepa cunuun ti'iing.
S.PHON: sua peeʦapa kanakanavu miana ia ʔur~ɾuupaʦakim taʔuiʦi taʔuiʦi tia mataʔɨ umar~ɾa tikir~ɾiimkia ɨnʦoo mar~ɾaa maʔinaʦɨ toʔumaaŋ ar~ɾɨɨn tepa ʦunuun tiʔiiŋ.
S.FORM: sua peecapa Kanakanavu miana ia 'uruupacakim ta'uici ta'uici tia mata'ʉ umara tikiriimkia ʉncoo maraa ma'inacʉ to'umaang arʉʉn tepa cunuun ti'iing.
S.PHON: sua peeʦapa kanakanavu miana ia ʔur~ɾuupaʦakim taʔuiʦi taʔuiʦi tia mataʔɨ umar~ɾa tikir~ɾiimkia ɨnʦoo mar~ɾaa maʔinaʦɨ toʔumaaŋ ar~ɾɨɨn tepa ʦunuun tiʔiiŋ.
S.TRANSL: 以前Kanakanavu的釣竿是使用細的桂竹,要生鮮的,我們尋找比較直的竹子,拿了之後還要稍微用火烤.
Kanavuravu is a kind of sinocalamus latiflorus. In fact, the one who goes fishing will use kapani.

S.FORM: tia macici ta'iing noo macicicu ia tia suma'inacʉn makaasua ʉncoo capa ia mamanʉng.
S.PHON: tia maʦiʦi taʔiiŋ noo maʦiʦiʦu ia tia sumaʔinaʦɨn makaasua ɨnʦoo ʦapa ia mamanɨŋ.
S.FORM: tia macici ta'iing noo macicicu ia tia suma'inacʉn makaasua ʉncoo capa ia mamanʉng.
S.PHON: tia maʦiʦi taʔiiŋ noo maʦiʦiʦu ia tia sumaʔinaʦɨn makaasua ɨnʦoo ʦapa ia mamanɨŋ.
S.TRANSL: 要熱一點,熱了以後,要把它變直.像那樣的釣竿才是好的.
The temperature should be a little higher. After it gets heated, one needs to straighten the bamboo. Such a fishing pole is good.

S.FORM: tepakita mati'araang ʉ'ʉ neen sua kʉcʉ iihua? narupu narupu.
S.PHON: tepakita matiʔar~ɾaaŋ ɨʔɨ neen sua kɨʦɨ iihua? nar~ɾupu nar~ɾupu.
S.FORM: tepakita mati'araang ʉ'ʉ neen sua kʉcʉ iihua? narupu narupu.
S.PHON: tepakita matiʔar~ɾaaŋ ɨʔɨ neen sua kɨʦɨ iihua? nar~ɾupu nar~ɾupu.
S.TRANSL: 我們還要準備,那是什麼啊,對啦,魚鉤.
We still need to prepare...what's that...yup, the hook.

S.FORM: 'unacu capa racee ʉn 'unacu cepa narupu hau tekita mo cʉmcʉm aramia'ʉ.
S.PHON: ʔunaʦu ʦapa r~ɾaʦee ɨn ʔunaʦu ʦepa nar~ɾupu hau tekita mo ʦɨmʦɨm ar~ɾamiaʔɨ.
S.FORM: 'unacu capa racee ʉn 'unacu cepa narupu hau tekita mo cʉmcʉm aramia'ʉ.
S.PHON: ʔunaʦu ʦapa r~ɾaʦee ɨn ʔunaʦu ʦepa nar~ɾupu hau tekita mo ʦɨmʦɨm ar~ɾamiaʔɨ.
S.TRANSL: 有了釣竿、魚鉤,我們要很早起床.
There are fishing poles and hooks. We have to get up early.

S.FORM: tia maica na ra ra ratakʉʉtakʉ sii 'inia ia 'una ngica'ʉ.
S.PHON: tia maiʦa na r~ɾa r~ɾa r~ɾatakɨɨtakɨ sii ʔinia ia ʔuna ŋiʦaʔɨ.
S.FORM: tia maica na ra ra ratakʉʉtakʉ sii 'inia ia 'una ngica'ʉ.
S.PHON: tia maiʦa na r~ɾa r~ɾa r~ɾatakɨɨtakɨ sii ʔinia ia ʔuna ŋiʦaʔɨ.
S.TRANSL: 要經過泥濘的地方,因為那裏有蚯蚓.

TRANSL.notes: (We) need to pass through the muddy area because there are earthworms.

S.TRANSL: need to pass through the muddy area because there are earthworms.

S.FORM: tia matisa'ʉ maan mataarava mapusan ngica'ʉ umaavici na cakʉran.
S.PHON: tia matisaʔɨ maan mataar~ɾava mapusan ŋiʦaʔɨ umaaviʦi na ʦakɨr~ɾan.
S.FORM: tia matisa'ʉ maan mataarava mapusan ngica'ʉ umaavici na cakʉran.
S.PHON: tia matisaʔɨ maan mataar~ɾava mapusan ŋiʦaʔɨ umaaviʦi na ʦakɨr~ɾan.
S.TRANSL: 要抓十到二十條的蚯蚓,帶到河裡.

TRANSL.notes: (We) need to catch ten to twelve earthworms and bring them to the river.

S.TRANSL: need to catch ten to twelve earthworms and bring them to the river.

S.FORM: noo mookusacu cakʉran ia arʉʉncu ngica'ʉ iihua ʉsʉ'ʉn na narupu matiikusa na canumu.
S.PHON: noo mookusaʦu ʦakɨr~ɾan ia ar~ɾɨɨnʦu ŋiʦaʔɨ iihua ɨsɨʔɨn na nar~ɾupu matiikusa na ʦanumu.
S.FORM: noo mookusacu cakʉran ia arʉʉncu ngica'ʉ iihua ʉsʉ'ʉn na narupu matiikusa na canumu.
S.PHON: noo mookusaʦu ʦakɨr~ɾan ia ar~ɾɨɨnʦu ŋiʦaʔɨ iihua ɨsɨʔɨn na nar~ɾupu matiikusa na ʦanumu.
S.TRANSL: 到了河裡之後,就拿那個蚯蚓放在魚鉤上,拋向水裡.

TRANSL.notes: After arriving in the river, we take that earthworm and put it on the hook and toss (the hook) toward the water.

S.TRANSL: After arriving in the river, we take that earthworm and put it on the hook and toss toward the water.

S.FORM: tumatimanaku marang mamarang miana sua vutuukuru kaan ia sua maraa tatia ia monoon na ʉncoo mintasʉ canuum.
S.PHON: tumatimanaku mar~ɾaŋ mamar~ɾaŋ miana sua vutuukur~ɾu kaan ia sua mar~ɾaa tatia ia monoon na ɨnʦoo mintasɨ ʦanuum.
S.FORM: tumatimanaku marang mamarang miana sua vutuukuru kaan ia sua maraa tatia ia monoon na ʉncoo mintasʉ canuum.
S.PHON: tumatimanaku mar~ɾaŋ mamar~ɾaŋ miana sua vutuukur~ɾu kaan ia sua mar~ɾaa tatia ia monoon na ɨnʦoo mintasɨ ʦanuum.
S.TRANSL: 我聽以前的老人家說比較大的魚經常待在...那個...比較湍急的水.
it is said that bigger fish often stay...well...in rapid currents.

S.FORM: 'apanapaku moon nia moon kangvang na mintasʉ canuum pinaarupu nakai ma'icʉpʉku noo matikocu canuum narupu na vatu ia ka'aancu tarʉ'ʉn arʉʉn mooncukia nia muru'inasʉ.
S.PHON: ʔapanapaku moon nia moon kaŋvaŋ na mintasɨ ʦanuum pinaar~ɾupu nakai maʔiʦɨpɨku noo matikoʦu ʦanuum nar~ɾupu na vatu ia kaʔaanʦu tar~ɾɨʔɨn ar~ɾɨɨn moonʦukia nia mur~ɾuʔinasɨ.
S.FORM: 'apanapaku moon nia moon kangvang na mintasʉ canuum pinaarupu nakai ma'icʉpʉku noo matikocu canuum narupu na vatu ia ka'aancu tarʉ'ʉn arʉʉn mooncukia nia muru'inasʉ.
S.PHON: ʔapanapaku moon nia moon kaŋvaŋ na mintasɨ ʦanuum pinaar~ɾupu nakai maʔiʦɨpɨku noo matikoʦu ʦanuum nar~ɾupu na vatu ia kaʔaanʦu tar~ɾɨʔɨn ar~ɾɨɨn moonʦukia nia mur~ɾuʔinasɨ.
S.TRANSL: 我也嘗試在湍急的河流釣魚,但是又擔心魚鉤鉤住石頭而拉不回來,我就會在那邊很困擾.
I sometimes fish in more rapid water. But I'm afraid that the hook gets stuck among the stones and cannot be pulled back. I will be bothered there.

S.FORM: imoo maraa manmaanku moon na niatumura ra canumu moon nia pinaarupu.
S.PHON: imoo mar~ɾaa manmaanku moon na niatumur~ɾa r~ɾa ʦanumu moon nia pinaar~ɾupu.
S.FORM: imoo maraa manmaanku moon na niatumura ra canumu moon nia pinaarupu.
S.PHON: imoo mar~ɾaa manmaanku moon na niatumur~ɾa r~ɾa ʦanumu moon nia pinaar~ɾupu.
S.TRANSL: 所以,我比較喜歡在深潭,待在那裡釣魚.
So, I like to fish in deep water more.

S.FORM: nakai na niatumura canumu ia cucuru maraa ka'aan tatia sua vutuukuru 'inia.
S.PHON: nakai na niatumur~ɾa ʦanumu ia ʦuʦur~ɾu mar~ɾaa kaʔaan tatia sua vutuukur~ɾu ʔinia.
S.FORM: nakai na niatumura canumu ia cucuru maraa ka'aan tatia sua vutuukuru 'inia.
S.PHON: nakai na niatumur~ɾa ʦanumu ia ʦuʦur~ɾu mar~ɾaa kaʔaan tatia sua vutuukur~ɾu ʔinia.
S.TRANSL: 但是在深潭那裏的魚的確比較不大.
but the fish in deep water there truely are relatively not big.

S.FORM: miana noo arakukunkim mamarurang pinaarupu noo mana'ʉcu vutuukuru na capamia ia manasʉ makasicu kimia marang Pani umara maringuna karu nukai to'umaang mosa na cikiiringa isa matupuru.
S.PHON: miana noo ar~ɾakukunkim mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋ pinaar~ɾupu noo manaʔɨʦu vutuukur~ɾu na ʦapamia ia manasɨ makasiʦu kimia mar~ɾaŋ pani umar~ɾa mar~ɾiŋuna kar~ɾu nukai toʔumaaŋ mosa na ʦikiir~ɾiŋa isa matupur~ɾu.
S.FORM: miana noo arakukunkim mamarurang pinaarupu noo mana'ʉcu vutuukuru na capamia ia manasʉ makasicu kimia marang Pani umara maringuna karu nukai to'umaang mosa na cikiiringa isa matupuru.
S.PHON: miana noo ar~ɾakukunkim mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋ pinaar~ɾupu noo manaʔɨʦu vutuukur~ɾu na ʦapamia ia manasɨ makasiʦu kimia mar~ɾaŋ pani umar~ɾa mar~ɾiŋuna kar~ɾu nukai toʔumaaŋ mosa na ʦikiir~ɾiŋa isa matupur~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 以前我們若跟著老一輩的人一起釣魚,當我們釣的魚已經到魚簍的一半的時候,通常我們的老人家就會呼喊著說:「Pani,你去拿乾材或者竹子到河流的邊邊上生火.」
In the past, when we went fishing with our seniors and the fish can fill half of the creel, the seniors would say "Pani, go take the dry wood and go there to make a fire."

S.FORM: pasiinmaku tuu neen neen ka'aanpa ca'aania neen vanai tia makefireAF callPF1SGGEN.
S.PHON: pasiinmaku tuu neen neen kaʔaanpa ʦaʔaania neen vanai tia makefir~ɾeaf ʦa**pf*s**en.
S.FORM: pasiinmaku tuu neen neen ka'aanpa ca'aania neen vanai tia makefireAF callPF1SGGEN.
S.PHON: pasiinmaku tuu neen neen kaʔaanpa ʦaʔaania neen vanai tia makefir~ɾeaf ʦa**pf*s**en.
S.TRANSL: 我跟他們說還沒到中午,為什麼要起火.
I said to them "It isn't noon, why do we need to make a fire?"

S.FORM: mariivari mamarang ka'aankasu cumacʉ'ʉra? curoon vutuukurumita tecukuratumuru na capamita tia capʉʉn cucumeen sii 'aan aa marua.
S.PHON: mar~ɾiivar~ɾi mamar~ɾaŋ kaʔaankasu ʦumaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa? ʦur~ɾoon vutuukur~ɾumita teʦukur~ɾatumur~ɾu na ʦapamita tia ʦapɨɨn ʦuʦumeen sii ʔaan aa mar~ɾua.
S.FORM: mariivari mamarang ka'aankasu cumacʉ'ʉra? curoon vutuukurumita tecukuratumuru na capamita tia capʉʉn cucumeen sii 'aan aa marua.
S.PHON: mar~ɾiivar~ɾi mamar~ɾaŋ kaʔaankasu ʦumaʦɨʔɨr~ɾa? ʦur~ɾoon vutuukur~ɾumita teʦukur~ɾatumur~ɾu na ʦapamita tia ʦapɨɨn ʦuʦumeen sii ʔaan aa mar~ɾua.
S.TRANSL: 老人家回答:「你沒看到嗎?我們的魚要滿出魚簍了,一部分要烤起來,才不會腐爛.」
The old people replied, "Don't you see it? The creel is so full that our fish are going to drop out. Some of the fish need to be roasted so that they won't rot."

S.FORM: 'aa! tavarʉ'ʉcuku.
S.PHON: ʔaa! tavar~ɾɨʔɨʦuku.
S.FORM: 'aa! tavarʉ'ʉcuku.
S.PHON: ʔaa! tavar~ɾɨʔɨʦuku.
S.TRANSL: 啊!我知道了.
"Ah, I get it."

W.TRANSL: 知道.主焦=狀態改變=1SG.主格

S.FORM: mooncukim na cikiiringa nia mamanu ta ti'iing matuapuru.
S.PHON: moonʦukim na ʦikiir~ɾiŋa nia mamanu ta tiʔiiŋ matuapur~ɾu.
S.FORM: mooncukim na cikiiringa nia mamanu ta ti'iing matuapuru.
S.PHON: moonʦukim na ʦikiir~ɾiŋa nia mamanu ta tiʔiiŋ matuapur~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 我們小朋友們就在河邊上升火.
We little kids then made a fire over there.

W.TRANSL: 在.主焦=狀態改變=1PL.主格.排除

S.FORM: mova kimia mamarang sua vutuukuru.
S.PHON: mova kimia mamar~ɾaŋ sua vutuukur~ɾu.
S.FORM: mova kimia mamarang sua vutuukuru.
S.PHON: mova kimia mamar~ɾaŋ sua vutuukur~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 老人家就給我們魚.
The old people gave us the fish.

S.FORM: sua maraa tatia ia arʉʉnmia nguain tamna siu singsingiinpa kangvang t'iing siu ʉsʉ'ʉn kangvang na vara iisua cumapa.
S.PHON: sua mar~ɾaa tatia ia ar~ɾɨɨnmia ŋuain tamna siu siŋsiŋiinpa kaŋvaŋ tʔiiŋ siu ɨsɨʔɨn kaŋvaŋ na var~ɾa iisua ʦumapa.
S.FORM: sua maraa tatia ia arʉʉnmia nguain tamna siu singsingiinpa kangvang t'iing siu ʉsʉ'ʉn kangvang na vara iisua cumapa.
S.PHON: sua mar~ɾaa tatia ia ar~ɾɨɨnmia ŋuain tamna siu siŋsiŋiinpa kaŋvaŋ tʔiiŋ siu ɨsɨʔɨn kaŋvaŋ na var~ɾa iisua ʦumapa.
S.TRANSL: 比較大的魚,我們取出牠的腸子,把腸子稍微洗一洗,拿到火炭上跟魚一起烤.
The bigger fish, we take out their bowels, wash a little, and roast on the burning charcoal.

S.FORM: iak! meesua ʉncoo siu 'arasakai vutuukuru kʉneen 'ah cu curu sa'o'o!
S.PHON: iak! meesua ɨnʦoo siu ʔar~ɾasakai vutuukur~ɾu kɨneen ʔah ʦu ʦur~ɾu saʔoʔo!
S.FORM: iak! meesua ʉncoo siu 'arasakai vutuukuru kʉneen 'ah cu curu sa'o'o!
S.PHON: iak! meesua ɨnʦoo siu ʔar~ɾasakai vutuukur~ɾu kɨneen ʔah ʦu ʦur~ɾu saʔoʔo!
S.TRANSL: 啊!那當下腸子、蝦子、魚真是好吃啊!
Ah, the bowels, shrimps, and fish tasted so awesome at that time.

S.FORM: makai sua iisi ikim Kanakanavu sua tia parivutuukuru misee ia kacangcangaramia aa matipa arakukun 'inia.
S.PHON: makai sua iisi ikim kanakanavu sua tia par~ɾivutuukur~ɾu misee ia kaʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾamia aa matipa ar~ɾakukun ʔinia.
S.FORM: makai sua iisi ikim Kanakanavu sua tia parivutuukuru misee ia kacangcangaramia aa matipa arakukun 'inia.
S.PHON: makai sua iisi ikim kanakanavu sua tia par~ɾivutuukur~ɾu misee ia kaʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾamia aa matipa ar~ɾakukun ʔinia.
S.TRANSL: 我們kanakanavu提到像這些釣魚這件事是一件令人很愉悅的事情,都很樂於一同參加.

TRANSL.notes: Such like that, for us Kanakanavu, it is a pleasing event to talk about fishing. (We) are willing to join in (this activity).

S.TRANSL: Such like that, for us Kanakanavu, it is a pleasing event to talk about fishing. are willing to join in .

W.TRANSL: 高興-關係詞=1PL.所有格.排除

S.FORM: noo kana'amisan ia noo 'uneen canumu maraa mamanʉng kunaam ia marapakim 'uruupaca karu siuʉn 'inia umara ʉncoo kunaam.
S.PHON: noo kanaʔamisan ia noo ʔuneen ʦanumu mar~ɾaa mamanɨŋ kunaam ia mar~ɾapakim ʔur~ɾuupaʦa kar~ɾu siuɨn ʔinia umar~ɾa ɨnʦoo kunaam.
S.FORM: noo kana'amisan ia noo 'uneen canumu maraa mamanʉng kunaam ia marapakim 'uruupaca karu siuʉn 'inia umara ʉncoo kunaam.
S.PHON: noo kanaʔamisan ia noo ʔuneen ʦanumu mar~ɾaa mamanɨŋ kunaam ia mar~ɾapakim ʔur~ɾuupaʦa kar~ɾu siuɨn ʔinia umar~ɾa ɨnʦoo kunaam.
S.TRANSL: 當冬天的時候,如果水中有好的川苔,我們就會使用樹枝把川苔捲起來.
When winter comes, if there is good moss in water, we will still pick the moss out with wood sticks.

S.FORM: po'ocipikia 'aau noo musucikiicikicu canumu ia ʉsʉ'ʉn nia kunaam.
S.PHON: poʔoʦipikia ʔaau noo musuʦikiiʦikiʦu ʦanumu ia ɨsɨʔɨn nia kunaam.
S.FORM: po'ocipikia 'aau noo musucikiicikicu canumu ia ʉsʉ'ʉn nia kunaam.
S.PHON: poʔoʦipikia ʔaau noo musuʦikiiʦikiʦu ʦanumu ia ɨsɨʔɨn nia kunaam.
S.TRANSL: 我們煮湯,當水沸騰了以後,我們就放入川苔.
We cook soup. When the water is boiling, we put the moss in.

S.FORM: noo 'uneen 'arasakai ia mamanʉng sua maraa 'aan maraa ka'aanpa tatia tia ti'ingee 'arasakai kangvang 'apasʉ ti'ingee vutuukuru ʉsʉ'ʉn na ʉsʉ'ʉn na 'aau ii 'aau iisua.
S.PHON: noo ʔuneen ʔar~ɾasakai ia mamanɨŋ sua mar~ɾaa ʔaan mar~ɾaa kaʔaanpa tatia tia tiʔiŋee ʔar~ɾasakai kaŋvaŋ ʔapasɨ tiʔiŋee vutuukur~ɾu ɨsɨʔɨn na ɨsɨʔɨn na ʔaau ii ʔaau iisua.
S.FORM: noo 'uneen 'arasakai ia mamanʉng sua maraa 'aan maraa ka'aanpa tatia tia ti'ingee 'arasakai kangvang 'apasʉ ti'ingee vutuukuru ʉsʉ'ʉn na ʉsʉ'ʉn na 'aau ii 'aau iisua.
S.PHON: noo ʔuneen ʔar~ɾasakai ia mamanɨŋ sua mar~ɾaa ʔaan mar~ɾaa kaʔaanpa tatia tia tiʔiŋee ʔar~ɾasakai kaŋvaŋ ʔapasɨ tiʔiŋee vutuukur~ɾu ɨsɨʔɨn na ɨsɨʔɨn na ʔaau ii ʔaau iisua.
S.TRANSL: 如果有蝦子,最好是小的,還有螃蟹、小的魚,放進那鍋湯裡面.

TRANSL.notes: If there are shrimps─small ones should be better, crabs, and small fish, (we) put (all) into that pot of soup.

S.TRANSL: If there are shrimps─small ones should be better, crabs, and small fish, put into that pot of soup.

S.FORM: ia'ah! mamarang tumatimanaku marang miana arapipiningcu kariin makasi 'aa! kangvang na 'aau iisa isi mas taan sa'o'o misee.
S.PHON: iaʔah! mamar~ɾaŋ tumatimanaku mar~ɾaŋ miana ar~ɾapipiniŋʦu kar~ɾiin makasi ʔaa! kaŋvaŋ na ʔaau iisa isi mas taan saʔoʔo misee.
S.FORM: ia'ah! mamarang tumatimanaku marang miana arapipiningcu kariin makasi 'aa! kangvang na 'aau iisa isi mas taan sa'o'o misee.
S.PHON: iaʔah! mamar~ɾaŋ tumatimanaku mar~ɾaŋ miana ar~ɾapipiniŋʦu kar~ɾiin makasi ʔaa! kaŋvaŋ na ʔaau iisa isi mas taan saʔoʔo misee.
S.TRANSL: 「啊!」以前我聽到老人家說出這樣的話:「啊!所有的湯裡面,這個湯是最好的.」

TRANSL.notes: "Ah," I heard the old people say like this in the past, "Ah, among all the kinds of soup, this (soup) is the best."

S.TRANSL: "Ah," I heard the old people say like this in the past, "Ah, among all the kinds of soup, this is the best."

S.FORM: 'aa! cucuru pacʉpʉcʉpʉngʉn miana siacʉvʉrʉmita Kanakanavu kacangcangarʉnmaku pacʉpʉcʉpʉngʉn.
S.PHON: ʔaa! ʦuʦur~ɾu paʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋɨn miana siaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨmita kanakanavu kaʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨnmaku paʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋɨn.
S.FORM: 'aa! cucuru pacʉpʉcʉpʉngʉn miana siacʉvʉrʉmita Kanakanavu kacangcangarʉnmaku pacʉpʉcʉpʉngʉn.
S.PHON: ʔaa! ʦuʦur~ɾu paʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋɨn miana siaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨmita kanakanavu kaʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨnmaku paʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋɨn.
S.TRANSL: 啊!想起來我們Kanakanavu以往的生活方式真的令我很快樂.
Ah, We think that we Kanakanavu's way of living in the past is reminiscent whenever I recall.

S.FORM: imoo makai iisi 'aa! to'onaamita temita patimanʉngʉn sii mataarava nuari tia 'una kangvang manumita 'una maningcau 'ʉnai to'onain cumacʉvʉrʉ aratatia.
S.PHON: imoo makai iisi ʔaa! toʔonaamita temita patimanɨŋɨn sii mataar~ɾava nuar~ɾi tia ʔuna kaŋvaŋ manumita ʔuna maniŋʦau ʔɨnai toʔonain ʦumaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ ar~ɾatatia.
S.FORM: imoo makai iisi 'aa! to'onaamita temita patimanʉngʉn sii mataarava nuari tia 'una kangvang manumita 'una maningcau 'ʉnai to'onain cumacʉvʉrʉ aratatia.
S.PHON: imoo makai iisi ʔaa! toʔonaamita temita patimanɨŋɨn sii mataar~ɾava nuar~ɾi tia ʔuna kaŋvaŋ manumita ʔuna maniŋʦau ʔɨnai toʔonain ʦumaʦɨvɨr~ɾɨ ar~ɾatatia.
S.TRANSL: 所以,像這些我們所住的地方,我們要把它弄得好好的,使我們的後代將來也有美好的地方可以生活成長.
So, such like the places we live in, we have to keep them well so as to let our offspring have good places to grow up.

S.FORM: 'aa! makaasua tia karimaku isi nguaci.
S.PHON: ʔaa! makaasua tia kar~ɾimaku isi ŋuaʦi.
S.FORM: 'aa! makaasua tia karimaku isi nguaci.
S.PHON: ʔaa! makaasua tia kar~ɾimaku isi ŋuaʦi.
S.TRANSL: 啊!我要說的就是這樣,僅此.
Ah, this is what I want to say. That's it.
